homeDiscovery.standardsTitle: Trust is built in the details.
homeDiscovery.standardsDesc: A strong auction is more than the item. It comes from verifiable information, a process that is easy to follow and clear responsibility at every step.

itemProfile.title: Clear item profiles
itemProfile.description: Information, images and supporting documents are presented together before each auction.

controlledDeposit.title: Controlled deposits
controlledDeposit.description: Deposits strengthen commitment and discourage unserious bids.

history.title: Transparent transaction history
history.description: Auction status, prices and processing milestones are retained for easy tracking.

security.title: Layered account protection
security.description: Identity verification and access controls are integrated throughout the experience.

homeDiscovery.faqDesc: Essential information to help you buy, sell and bid with confidence on BidZone.

beforeBidding.question: What do I need before joining an auction?
beforeBidding.answer: Create an account, complete the required information and place the deposit specified for the auction.

liveAuction.question: How can I tell when an auction is live?
liveAuction.answer: Active auctions are marked Live on the auctions page. Open the auction room to follow the price and remaining time.

deposit.question: How is my deposit handled?
deposit.answer: Your deposit is recorded in your BidZone wallet and handled according to the result and terms of each auction.

watchlist.question: Can I follow items I am interested in?
watchlist.answer: Yes. Add items to your Watchlist for quick access and status tracking from your account area.

selling.question: How does a seller list an item?
selling.answer: Seller accounts create an item profile, upload images and submit it for review before it is scheduled for auction.

support.question: Where can I get transaction support?
support.answer: Use Messages or Support in your account to submit a request and track BidZone's response.

adminBiddingRules.title: Auction rules
adminBiddingRules.subtitle: These rules are automatically enforced by the system. Changing the rules requires backend configuration updates.

sections.title: Timed auctions (TIMED) — public, real funds
rules: Every KYC-verified user can bid without placing a deposit. Sellers cannot bid on their own products.
The highest price, leading bidder and bid history are publicly visible.
Bid step = 5% of the current price, rounded up to the nearest thousand VND. The first bid only needs to match the starting price.
When bidding, the matching amount is HELD in the wallet; if outbid, it is refunded immediately.
The winner pays using the held funds and signs the electronic sale contract to complete the purchase.
Session duration is fixed at 6-12 hours with no extension.

sections.title: Live auctions (LIVE) — deposit, anti-sniping
rules: A deposit must be placed at least 3 minutes before the start time to enter the room.
The room opens for 3 minutes; bid step is fixed by the starting-price tier (100k / 500k / 5m / 10m).
Anti-sniping: a bid in the final 15 seconds extends the remaining time back to at least 15 seconds.
Winner pays within 72 hours; the deposit is deducted from the closing price.

sections.title: Payment & penalties
rules: If the winner does not pay within 72 hours, the deposit/held funds are forfeited to the platform and 1 strike is recorded.
Accounts reaching the strike limit are locked and can only be unlocked by an admin.
Products without a winner or with a defaulted winner return to the approval queue for rescheduling.
Platform commission is 20% of the closing price; 80% goes to the seller. Platform-owned products return 100% to the platform.
